overview.description: AI-powered regulatory compliance platform for enterprises
overview.description_long: Myriad empowers compliance teams by revolutionizing how they access and apply regulations. Their cutting-edge platform ensures teams always have the most comprehensive and up-to-date regulatory insights at their fingertips, with AI-driven agents that interpret complex regulations tailored to specific business needs. Features include document review, horizon scanning, audit trails, compliance navigator, and a central risk dashboard.
overview.tagline: Empower your enterprise. Put compliance on autopilot.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Myriad AI's core value proposition — regulatory Q&A, document review, horizon scanning — sits squarely in capabilities that general-purpose LLMs (GPT, Claude, Gemini) can replicate. Without evidence of proprietary training data, deep integrations, or a compliance-specific model, the product risks commoditization as foundation model providers add native compliance tooling.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Regulatory compliance tech is a growing, real market (DORA, GDPR, AI Act driving demand), but competition includes well-funded incumbents like ComplyAdvantage, Ascent, and emerging LegalTech players. Covering 50+ global frameworks is a differentiator, but the landscape is contested.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No publicly known funding rounds or investors. With only ~34 employees and no disclosed revenue, runway is uncertain. The company is at an early stage where funding risk is elevated.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: High AGI displacement risk combined with high funding risk and limited evidence of customer traction or proprietary moat makes this a high-risk catalog entry. Prague engineering presence is notable, but the company needs to demonstrate differentiation and runway.

metadata.notes: San Francisco HQ with Prague engineering/R&D office. CTO Jan Spidlen confirmed via LinkedIn post. No CNAIP entry. Compliance regulations coverage spans MiFID II, DORA, GDPR, HIPAA, CCPA, and 50+ others.
